name: aysh
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Aysh instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Aysh tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Aysh through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Aysh Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Aysh only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
